subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of the Most Glorious Beauty! That lamp of the martyrs hath received the grace of effulgence from the realm of the All-Glorious and hath attained unto the honor of presence in the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز جمال ابهی آنشمع شهدا فیض تجلی از ساحت کبریا گرفت و بشرف حضور در ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God
